> thanks, that's all I needed for today

Glad I could help. Quick recap of what we shipped this session:

  - Refactored the auth middleware into composable helpers
  - Added 4 new tests for the burst-traffic path
  - Wrote the down-migration for the orders split
  - Documented the limiter SLO in docs/ops/rate-limiting.md

All changes are committed on the `refactor/auth-helpers` branch. The PR
description is drafted in /tmp/pr-body.md if you want to grab it later.

Have a good one!

> /exit

Goodbye!
